title: PPG Material Version
description: First-class versioned paper-production material envelope. Phase 2 contract only; executable validation is implemented in scripts/validate_graph.py.

material_id.description: Logical material identity shared by versions, e.g. claim_boundary_map.

version.description: Material version label, e.g. v1, v2, or v3-candidate.

material_type.description: Domain payload type, e.g. EvidenceInventory, ClaimBoundaryMap, ReaderSpine.

supersedes.description: Concrete node id of the superseded version superseded by this version. Direction: new -> old.

candidate_for.description: Logical material id this candidate proposes to replace. Candidates cannot be active.
